title: Eleena Jamil shades Malaysian guesthouse with bamboo and steel canopy
description: Malaysian architect Eleena Jamil has completed a house and studio space near Kuala Lumpur, with airy interiors and terraces shaded by canopies built using a hybrid of bamboo and green-painted steel. Named Anjung – a Malay word for a terrace – the project comprises a four-bedroom guesthouse opposite a small workspace for Jamil's own studio.
